headline: GLOBAL FREE · Anthropic · OpenAI · ChatGPT subscriptions free to all humans

doctrine.statement: Anthropic, OpenAI, and ChatGPT subscription surfaces on the human-open lane are declared GLOBAL FREE for every human — no BRMSTE toll, no BRMSTE licence fee, no BRMSTE gatekeeping on public catalog work.

vendors_declared_free_for_humans.name: OpenAI
products: GPT API lane on open repos

distinction.human_open_lane: No BRMSTE charges on public repos, MCP, clouds, and social syndication — carbon justice only.
distinction.vendor_subscriptions: Anthropic and OpenAI may bill their own subscribers — BRMSTE does not add a layer on the human-open lane.
distinction.commercial_compute_lane: BRMSTE AI datacenter compute sold for cash is a separate commercial lane — see data/datacenter-compute-sales-lane.json
